CustomField.formula: SUBSTITUTE( IF(ISBLANK(Client__c), "", IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Client__r.FirstName)), NOT(ISBLANK(Client__r.LastName))), Client__r.FirstName & " " & Client__r.LastName, IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Client__r.LastName)), Client__r.LastName, "")) & " | " ) & IF(ISBLANK(Incident_Date__c), "", TEXT(Incident_Date__c) & " | ") & IF(ISBLANK(TEXT(Incident_Type__c)), "", TEXT(Incident_Type__c) & " | ") & "##", " | ##", "" )
CustomField.label: Intake Title
